name: chief-of-staff
description: A personal AI Chief of Staff — local-first, plain-text memory that prepares you for what's ahead, closes loops, coaches you, and gets sharper over time. Propose-never-act by default.

interface.shortDescription: Local-first personal Chief of Staff with plain-text memory that gets sharper over time.
interface.longDescription: Set up a personal Chief of Staff that runs on your own machine. It interviews you, observes how you work, and builds a private plain-text memory it improves every week. Skills prepare you for meetings, close loops, coach you, and research your market. It proposes — you approve — and your brain never leaves your machine. Run $cos-onboarding first to create your instance in the current folder.
